data.title: First National Bank Alaska reported $18.4 million net income in Q2 2025, up from $15.6 million in Q2 2024.
data.description: Alaska-based First National Bank reported a net income of $18.4 million in the second quarter of 2025, translating to $5.80 per share. This marks an increase from the $15.6 million net income, or $4.94 per share, recorded in the corresponding quarter of 2024.

data.title: Gold and tech stocks lead top ratings, including AngloGold Ashanti on IBD's lists. New names on IBD's lists like IBD 50 and Big Cap 20.
data.description: Discover the latest inclusion of top-rated stocks such as the gold miner AngloGold Ashanti on Investor's Business Daily's prestigious lists of the best growth stocks. The recently updated lists, including IBD 50 and Big Cap 20, showcase the dominance of both the gold and tech sectors. Explore the new additions that are making waves in the market as investors seek growth opportunities.

data.title: Questerre's Q2 2025 results announced, not intended for US distribution.
data.description: This press release is not intended for distribution in the United States or to US news outlets and individuals.

data.title: C3 AI restructures sales & services org for growth, appointing Rob Schilling as EVP & Chief Commercial Officer.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, C3 AI, a leading Enterprise AI software company listed on NYSE as AI, recently completed a restructuring of its global sales and services organization during Q1. This restructuring saw the introduction of new leadership, with Rob Schilling appointed as EVP and Chief Commercial Officer effective June 16, 2025. In his new role, Schilling will oversee all sales, customer-facing teams, and Alliances. He brings extensive experience as an enterprise application sales leader to the company.

data.title: C3 AI reports preliminary financial results for Q1 2026. Full results to be disclosed on September 3, 2025.
data.description: C3.ai, Inc. unveiled initial financial figures for the fiscal first quarter concluding on July 31, 2025. The information, which remains unaudited, offers a glimpse into the company's performance. Full results for this period will be disclosed on September 3, 2025, along with an overview of fiscal 2026 projections. Thus, the Enterprise AI software firm, also known as C3 AI, is set to release a comprehensive report on its financial standing and future expectations in early September.

data.title: Blade Air Mobility to present at Oppenheimer conference on August 11, 2025 at 2:55pm ET. CFO, Will Heyburn, to present. Webcast and replay available.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Blade Air Mobility, Inc. disclosed that their Chief Financial Officer, Will Heyburn, is scheduled to speak at the Oppenheimer 28th Annual Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 11, 2025, at 2:55pm ET. This event will be accessible via webcast, with a replay of the presentation available on the investor relations portion of Blade's website at https://ir.blade.com/news-events. Blade Air Mobility, Inc. is listed as "BLDE" on the Nasdaq.

data.title: Q-Gold updates activities, acquires Quartz Mountain Project in Oregon from Alamos Gold Inc. Read press release for details.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Q-Gold Resources Ltd. (TSXV: QGR) shared an update on their recent and upcoming activities, particularly regarding the mineral exploration project in south-central Oregon known as the Quartz Mountain Project. The company is in the process of acquiring this project from Alamos Gold Inc. as per a share exchange agreement from March 31, 2025. More details about this acquisition and the project can be found in the press release dated April 3, 2025, accessible on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: Thumzup Media Corp (Nasdaq: TZUP) announces public offering of Series D shares, disrupting advertising industry.
data.description: Los Angeles, August 8, 2025 - Thumzup Media Corporation (Nasdaq: TZUP) disclosed plans for a new public offering of shares for its Series D, aiming to raise capital for its digital asset aggregation and advertising ventures. The Company has initiated this effort in a bid to further disrupt the advertising industry and expand its operations. The move comes as Thumzup continues to bolster its presence in the market, with a clear focus on growth and innovation.

data.title: XORTX finishes private placement raising $114,500.
data.description: Sure, here is the rephrased news information:A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached an alarming level of 8.7%, with a total of 15.3 million people currently without jobs. This marks a significant increase compared to last month's rate of 6.4%. The service sector has been hit the hardest, accounting for the majority of job losses. Experts are forecasting a further rise in unemployment numbers in the upcoming months due to the ongoing economic challenges faced by the country. Efforts are being made at both governmental and corporate levels to address the issue and provide support to those affected by the job losses.

data.title: Intermap to share Q2 2025 earnings on August 14 with conference call. Plan to announce financial results.
data.description: The company is set to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 and will conduct a conference call on August 14, 2025. Investors and interested parties can anticipate the report on this date, which will shed light on the company's revenue, profits, and overall financial health for the months spanning April to June 2025. The conference call presents an opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights, ask questions, and obtain further details regarding the company's financial standing during this period. Such updates are crucial for stakeholders to assess the company's progress, make informed decisions, and understand its future prospects.

data.title: Wisconsin law grants autonomy to APRNs, incl. CRNAs. Assembly Bill 257 passed on Aug. 8, 2025. #NursingAutonomy
data.description: In Rosemont, Illinois, on August 8, 2025, Wisconsin approved a new law granting greater independence to Advanced Practice Registered Nurses (APRNs), such as Certified Registered Nurse Anesthetists (CRNAs). The legislation, known as Wisconsin Assembly Bill 257, provides more autonomy for APRNs to practice their specialized skills. This development signifies a significant shift in the professional landscape for nurses in Wisconsin, impacting a large number of healthcare practitioners in the state.

data.title: Ardagh Group receives support from over 90% holders of SSN and SUN Indentures and over 75% holders of PIK Notes Indenture.
data.description: Ardagh has received backing from more than 90% of stakeholders for both the SSN and SUN Indentures, and over 75% for the PIK Notes Indenture in Luxembourg. This positive development was shared by Ardagh Group S.A. on August 9, 2025. The Company expressed satisfaction with the significant support garnered from stakeholders in these key areas.

data.title: Think+ Network launches AutoSave, a smart energy service, currently available in Ohio, Illinois, and Washington D.C. - expanding to more markets soon.
data.description: AutoSave has been launched by Think+ Network in Ohio, Illinois, and Washington, D.C., and will soon be expanding to more markets. The initiative was announced today in NEW YORK on Aug. 8, 2025. AutoSave is a novel electricity service introduced by Think Home, a purpose-driven independent salesforce.

data.title: Crown Capital Partners Inc. reported a Q2 2025 net loss of $(3.5) million compared to $(15.2) million in Q2 2024. Adjusted EBITDA was $1.3 million in Q2 2025. Distribution services revenue increased to $10.8 million in Q2 2025, while Network services revenue was $6.1 million. Total equity decreased to $3.8 million at quarter-end. Loss attributable to Shareholders was $(3.5) million in Q2 2025. Total revenue for the quarter was $18.5 million. Total assets amounted to $142,668 thousand by the end of the quarter.
data.description: Crown Capital Partners Inc. reported its financial results for Q2 2025, showcasing a net loss of $(3.5) million compared to $(15.2) million in Q2 2024. Adjusted EBITDA was $1.3 million, down from $1.9 million in Q2 2024 due to decreased earnings in various segments. Distribution services revenue increased by 15.7% to $10.8 million, with Network services revenue at $6.1 million and Real Estate segment revenue at $1.0 million. Distributed Power revenue decreased to $0.1 million. Total equity decreased to $3.8 million, with a net loss attributable to shareholders of $(5.3) million. Total assets were $142.7 million. Quarterly reconciliation showed adjustments in depreciation, finance costs, and payments of lease obligations.  More details on Benzinga.com.

data.description: This press release is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination within the United States.

data.title: Enovix shareholders reminded of early warrant expiration condition met twice with 14 consecutive days above $10.50 price.
data.description: Enovix warrants have experienced a positive trend with 14 consecutive trading days where the value has remained above $10.50. This consistency signifies a strong performance and stability in the market. Investors have shown confidence in the warrants as they have consistently maintained a value above this threshold, indicating a promising outlook for Enovix in the market. This streak of value retention highlights the potential for growth and profitability, making these warrants an attractive option for investors seeking stable returns.

data.title: Tokenized stocks boost DeFi as NFTs grow popular. DeFi liquidity hits $270B while NFT DApps attract more users in July.
data.description: In July, Non-Fungible Token (NFT) Decentralized Applications (DApps) attracted a slightly higher number of active users compared to Decentralized Finance (DeFi) platforms. This milestone was reached despite DeFi recording an all-time high liquidity of $270 billion during the same period.
California to Conduct Redistricting Election in November: The Hill

data.title: Harvard's endowment invests $116M in BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF, marking a substantial venture into cryptocurrency.
data.description: Harvard University has made a notable investment in BlackRock's Bitcoin exchange-traded fund. This move, although not confirmed as their initial venture into cryptocurrency, signifies a substantial commitment by the university.

data.title: Cape Cod Healthcare APPs file for NLRB election to join MNA for stronger voice in patient care. 250 Nurse Practitioners, Physician Assistants, and Certified Nurse Midwives involved.
data.description: In Cape Cod, Massachusetts, on August 8, 2025, a significant number of Nurse Practitioners, Physician Assistants, and Certified Nurse Midwives at Cape Cod Healthcare have decided to unite and become part of the Massachusetts Nurses Association (MNA). This move aims to ensure they have an equal say in clinical decisions. The majority of Advanced Practice Providers (APPs) at CCHC have joined forces for this cause.
